TestCase.name: testValuesAllEqualTypes
TestCase.Resource: LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 1, 2, _UTF-16LE'JKL' }, { 2, 3, _UTF-16LE'GHI' }, { 3, 4, _UTF-16LE'DEF' }, { 4, 5, _UTF-16LE'ABC' }]])
Values(tuples=[[{ 1, 2, _UTF-16LE'JKL' }, { 2, 3, _UTF-16LE'GHI' }, { 3, 4, _UTF-16LE'DEF' }, { 4, 5, _UTF-16LE'ABC' }]])

TestCase.name: testValuesFromLiterals
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ null }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(1:FLOAT):FLOAT AS f0]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(3.1E0:FLOAT):FLOAT AS f0]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(99:FLOAT):FLOAT AS f0]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[f0]) :- Values(tuples=[[{ null }]]) :- Calc(select=[CAST(1 AS FLOAT) AS f0]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[CAST(3.1E0 AS FLOAT) AS f0]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(99 AS FLOAT) AS f0]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesFromMixedObjectsAndExpressions
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[1:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, null:INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.141592653589793E0:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(1):INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.1E0:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'DEF':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(2):INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[99:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'DEFG':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, null:INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[0E-1:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'D':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(4):INTEGER AS f2]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[f0, f1, f2]) :- Calc(select=[1 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, null:INTEGER AS f2]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.141592653589793E0 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.1E0 AS f0, 'DEF' AS f1, CAST(2 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[99 AS f0, 'DEFG' AS f1, null:INTEGER AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[0E-1 AS f0, 'D' AS f1, CAST(4 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesFromNestedRowObject
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[1:DOUBLE AS f0, ROW(_UTF-16LE'A':VARCHAR(3) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", 2:DOUBLE) AS f1, ARRAY(1:BIGINT) AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[3.141592653589793E0:DOUBLE AS f0, ROW(_UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(3) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", 3.0E0:DOUBLE) AS f1, ARRAY(3:BIGINT) AS f2]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[f0, f1, f2]) :- Calc(select=[1 AS f0, ROW('A', 2) AS f1, ARRAY(1) AS f2]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[3.141592653589793E0 AS f0, ROW('ABC', 3.0E0) AS f1, ARRAY(3) AS f2]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesFromRowExpression
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(+(1, 3)):DOUBLE NOT NULL AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, MAP(_UTF-16LE'a':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", 3.0E0:DOUBLE) AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(+(ABS(-1), 2)):DOUBLE NOT NULL AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, MAP(_UTF-16LE'a':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", CAST(+(ABS(-5), -5)):DOUBLE) AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[PI AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, MAP(_UTF-16LE'abc':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", 3.0E0:DOUBLE) AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.1E0:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'DEF':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, MAP(_UTF-16LE'abcd':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", 3:DOUBLE) AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[99:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'DEFG':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, MAP(_UTF-16LE'a':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", 1:DOUBLE) AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[0E-1:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'D':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, null:(VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE", DOUBLE) MAP AS f2]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[f0, f1, f2]) :- Calc(select=[4E0 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, MAP('a', 3.0E0) AS f2]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3E0 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, MAP('a', CAST((ABS(-5) + -5) AS DOUBLE)) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.1415926535897931159E0 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, MAP('abc', 3.0E0) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.1E0 AS f0, 'DEF' AS f1, MAP('abcd', 3) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[99 AS f0, 'DEFG' AS f1, MAP('a', 1) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[0E-1 AS f0, 'D' AS f1, null:(VARCHAR(4), DOUBLE) MAP AS f2]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesFromRowObject
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[1:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, null:INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.141592653589793E0:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(1):INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.1E0:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'DEF':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(2):INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[99:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'DEFG':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(3):INTEGER AS f2]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[0E-1:DOUBLE AS f0, _UTF-16LE'D':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS f1, CAST(4):INTEGER AS f2]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[f0, f1, f2]) :- Calc(select=[1 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, null:INTEGER AS f2]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.141592653589793E0 AS f0, 'ABC' AS f1, CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.1E0 AS f0, 'DEF' AS f1, CAST(2 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[99 AS f0, 'DEFG' AS f1, CAST(3 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[0E-1 AS f0, 'D' AS f1, CAST(4 AS INTEGER) AS f2]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesFromRowObjectInCollection
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[1:DECIMAL(10, 2) AS a, _UTF-16LE'ABC ' AS b]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.141592653589793E0:DECIMAL(10, 2) AS a, _UTF-16LE'ABC ' AS b]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[3.1E0:DECIMAL(10, 2) AS a, _UTF-16LE'DEF ' AS b]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) :- LogicalProject(select=[99:DECIMAL(10, 2) AS a, _UTF-16LE'DEFG' AS b]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[0E-1:DECIMAL(10, 2) AS a, _UTF-16LE'D ' AS b]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[a, b]) :- Calc(select=[1 AS a, 'ABC ' AS b]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.141592653589793E0 AS a, 'ABC ' AS b]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[3.1E0 AS a, 'DEF ' AS b]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) :- Calc(select=[99 AS a, 'DEFG' AS b]) : +- Reused(reference_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[0E-1 AS a, 'D ' AS b]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesOverrideNullability
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(select=[CAST(+(1, 2)):BIGINT NOT NULL AS a, _UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(4) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS b, X'01020300':BINARY(4) AS c]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])
Calc(select=[3 AS a, 'ABC' AS b, X'01020300' AS c]) +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

TestCase.name: testValuesOverrideSchema
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(+(1, 2)):BIGINT AS a, CAST(_UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS b]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(2:BIGINT):BIGINT AS a, CAST(_UTF-16LE'ABC':VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE"):VARCHAR(2147483647) CHARACTER SET "UTF-16LE" AS b]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[a, b]) :- Calc(select=[CAST(3 AS BIGINT) AS a, CAST('ABC' AS VARCHAR(2147483647)) AS b]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(2 AS BIGINT) AS a, CAST('ABC' AS VARCHAR(2147483647)) AS b]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])

TestCase.name: testValuesWithComplexNesting
TestCase.Resource: LogicalUnion(all=[true]) :- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(1:DOUBLE):DOUBLE AS number, ROW(_UTF-16LE'A ', 2:DECIMAL(10, 2), ROW(00:00:00:TIME(3))) AS row, ARRAY(1:BIGINT) AS array]) : +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]]) +- LogicalProject(select=[CAST(3.141592653589793E0:DOUBLE):DOUBLE AS number, ROW(_UTF-16LE'ABC ', 3.0E0:DECIMAL(10, 2), ROW(00:00:00.1:TIME(3))) AS row, ARRAY(3:BIGINT) AS array]) +- LogicalValues(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])

Union(all=[true], union=[number, row, array]) :- Calc(select=[CAST(1 AS DOUBLE) AS number, ROW('A ', 2, ROW(00:00:00)) AS row, ARRAY(1) AS array]) : +- Values(tuples=[[{ 0 }]])(reuse_id=[1]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(3.141592653589793E0 AS DOUBLE) AS number, ROW('ABC ', 3.0E0, ROW(00:00:00.1)) AS row, ARRAY(3) AS array]) +- Reused(reference_id=[1])
